name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Cooldown
description: You are given an array prices where prices[i] is the price of a stock on the ith day. You may complete as many transactions as you like with the following restriction: after you sell, you cannot buy the next day (1-day cooldown). Return the maximum profit.

examples.output: 3 (buy at 1, sell at 3, cooldown, buy at 0, sell at 2)
